endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/caseClassifications:search
endpoints.description: Retrieve valid classifications to be used when creating a support case. The classications are hierarchical, with each classification containing all levels of the hierarchy, separated by " > ". For example "Technical Issue > Compute > Compute Engine".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/cases:search
endpoints.description: Search cases using the specified query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2beta/{name}
endpoints.description: Update the specified case. Only a subset of fields can be updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta/{name}:close
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/{name}:download
endpoints.description: Download a file attachment on a case. Note: HTTP requests must append "?alt=media" to the URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta/{name}:escalate
endpoints.description: Escalate a case. Escalating a case will initiate the Cloud Support escalation management process. This operation is only available to certain Customer Care tiers. Go to https://cloud.google.com/support and look for 'Technical support escalations' in the feature list to find out which tiers are able to perform escalations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/{parent}/attachments
endpoints.description: Retrieve all attachments associated with a support case.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta/{parent}/attachments
endpoints.description: Create a file attachment on a case or Cloud resource. The attachment object must have the following fields set: filename.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/{parent}/cases
endpoints.description: Retrieve all cases under the specified parent. Note: Listing cases under an Organization returns only the cases directly parented by that organization. To retrieve all cases under an organization, including cases parented by projects under that organization, use `cases.search`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta/{parent}/cases
endpoints.description: Create a new case and associate it with the given Cloud resource. The case object must have the following fields set: display_name, description, classification, and severity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta/{parent}/comments
endpoints.description: Retrieve all Comments associated with the Case object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta/{parent}/comments
endpoints.description: Add a new comment to the specified Case. The comment object must have the following fields set: body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
